# FuncSpan

> https://funcspan.funclexa.dev/

FuncSpan is a full-stack developer utility and network simulation engine operating as a core submodule within the FuncLexa web ecosystem. It enables real-time HTTP traffic inspection, artificial latency injection, response payload hotwiring, and custom API error state simulation for robust client-side edge-case testing.

## System Architecture

- **Micro-Frontend Dashboard**: SPA interface built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Inter, and JetBrains Mono fonts. Runs securely inside the isolated `/funcspan` subdirectory path.
- **Proxy Backend Engine**: A service-oriented Node.js routing controller designed to capture client incoming XMLHttpRequests/Fetch payloads, inject artificial delays or dynamic status codes, and return the modified stream headers back to the user origin.

## Core Module Subdirectories

- `/funcspan` (Root): The product introduction layer, system landing page, and developer ecosystem entry hub.
- `/funcspan/dashboard`: The live web app application canvas. Contains the draggable workspaces, custom configuration logs, network request tables, and active configuration settings.
- `/funcspan/api/`: The operational backend middleware routing endpoints. Restricted from global automated search engine crawling to conserve processing bandwidth.

## Key Metadata & Technical Specs

- **Parent Organization Hub**: FuncLexa (`https://funclexa.dev`)
- **Primary Domain Type**: Subdomain-isolated module (`funcspan.funclexa.dev`)
- **Key Engineering Constraints**:
  - Handles custom wildcard Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) configurations seamlessly between frontend clients and backend inspectors.
  - Built with local component isolation to allow developers to pressure-test API integrations instantly without external databases or token verification pipelines.
